description: Sarah, a staff accountant at Precision Manufacturing Group, needs to prepare the fixed asset depreciation schedule for the 2023 fiscal year-end close. Using the fixed asset register at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/pmg_fixed_assets.csv and the IRS MACRS tables in ~/Documents/macrs_tables.txt, create a professional depreciation schedule workbook. For each of the 28 assets, calculate the 2023 MACRS depreciation, accumulated MACRS depreciation, 2023 straight-line book depreciation (accounting for salvage value), and accumulated book depreciation. Calculate the net book value under both methods. Include a summary showing totals for 2023 MACRS depreciation, 2023 straight-line depreciation, and the total Book-Tax difference. Save the completed workbook to ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/depreciation_schedule_2023.xlsx.
